title: Fix pagination of the table in the condominiums topic
description:
The condominiums topic table has broken pagination. When paging past the initially-loaded data, new data is fetched but pagination resets to page 1 instead of staying on the requested page.

## Root Cause
In `src/components/topics/Condos.vue:43-46`, the `condos` computed returns an empty array while data is loading:

```js
if (CondosStore.loadingCondosData) {
  return [];
}
```

When `getDataForPageChange()` sets `loadingCondosData = true`, the table sees 0 rows, vue-good-table re-renders with no data, and the pagination state resets. When loading finishes and rows reappear, the pagination is already back on page 1.

## Reproduction
1. Search "2401 pennsylvania ave" (790 condos)
2. Either:
   a. Page forward to page 11 (where new API data needs to be fetched), OR
   b. Type a page number like 44 directly into the page input box
3. The correct data loads and displays, but pagination resets to page 1 instead of staying on the requested page

Both paths trigger the same bug — next/prev buttons use `nextPage()`/`previousPage()`, and the page input uses `changePage()`, but all three call `getDataForPageChange()` which sets `loadingCondosData = true`, causing the empty-array flash that resets pagination.

## Relevant Code
- **Table component**: `src/components/topics/Condos.vue` — defines the table, pagination options (10 per page), and the `condos` computed that returns `[]` during loading
- **Custom pagination**: `src/components/pagination/CustomPaginationLabelsCondos.vue` — `getDataForPageChange()` (line 153) sets `loadingCondosData = true` during fetch, triggering the reset. All navigation methods (`changePage`, `nextPage`, `previousPage`) call it.
- **Data store**: `src/stores/CondosStore.js` — `fillCondoData()` fetches from AIS API, stores pages in `condosData.pages`

## Architecture Notes
- API returns ~50 items per page; UI shows 10 per page
- Lazy loading: only fetches API pages as the user navigates forward
- `getDataForPageChange()` calculates which API page is needed and fetches missing intermediate pages

title: Add config-based switching to fillDorCondos for ArcGIS support
description:
Add config-based switching to fillDorCondos in DorStore.js to support both Carto and ArcGIS.

## Context
- Current implementation queries Carto: https://phl.carto.com/api/v2/sql?q=select * from condominium
- ArcGIS endpoint: https://services.arcgis.com/fLeGjb7u4uXqeF9q/ArcGIS/rest/services/Condominium/FeatureServer/0
- Field names are identical in both APIs (mapref, status, recmap, condoparcel, condounit)
- Follow the established pattern from LiStore.js

## Implementation
1. Add dorCondos key to src/config/apiSources.js
2. Import API_SOURCES in DorStore.js
3. Rename fillDorCondos to _fillDorCondosCarto
4. Create _fillDorCondosArcGIS querying FeatureServer with where=mapref='...' AND status IN (1,3)
5. New fillDorCondos dispatches based on config

## Testing
- Write test similar to LiStore.test.js to verify ArcGIS endpoint returns expected data
close_reason: Implemented config-based switching for fillDorCondos. Tests pass, build succeeds.
